text.title: Messaging House Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the messaging-house artifact. Subagent must satisfy this before channel writers consume it.

field.name: root_value_statement
field.constraint: word_count <= 18 AND contains who_for AND what_it_does AND outcome

field.name: channel_variants
field.constraint: every pillar has variants for ≥ 3 channels

forbidden.pattern: root_value_statement.word_count > 18 OR multiple root statements (violates r1)
any pillar with proof_points.length < 2 OR proof_points missing evidence + source (violates r3)
channel_variants with variant text that asserts a different pillar than the one it was created for (violates r4)
channel_variants exceeding channel character limits (X > 280, LinkedIn > 600 hero, email_subject > 50)
content_lead_owner == null OR multiple named owners (violates r5)
last_reviewed_date older than next launch by > 90 days

allowed-transformations.transformation: Add additional channels (TikTok, Reddit, podcast) beyond the minimum 4; same rules per variant.
A/B test variant within a channel; record A and B variants with the experiment id from growth-experiment-design.
Update root statement during a major repositioning; bump house version + log decision.

list.item: Root statement is one sentence, ≤ 18 words
Each pillar has 2-4 proof points with named source
Channel variants exist for ≥ 4 channels per pillar
